organisation: R&A Consulting and Brokerage Services Ltd / Aureon Institute
purpose: Single local grant-operator index combining local files, existing Drive evidence records, public profile pointers, repo archives, and grant-ready work packages.

sensitivity_policy.private_finance: Do not attach to grant packs or upload externally unless the exact recipient, purpose, and file are approved.
sensitivity_policy.research_paper: Use as authored research output or hypothesis unless independent validation is proven.
sensitivity_policy.source_code_or_docs: Use as open-source/software capability evidence after secret scan.
sensitivity_policy.grant_pack: Use as prior grant-operations evidence and copy base.

work_packages.title: Aureon Evidence OS for Safe Local AI Operations
best_routes: Invest NI Innovation Funding Advisory Service
Next Wave only if Createch fit is confirmed
work_packages.plain_description: A local-first AI workflow and evidence runtime for controlled, auditable operation of high-risk business and research processes.

work_packages.title: HNC Coherence Framework for AI-Driven Scientific Discovery
best_routes: future UKRI via eligible host partner
work_packages.plain_description: A hypothesis-driven software and research framework for coherence scoring, signal processing, evidence routing, and reproducible AI workflows.

work_packages.title: AI-Assisted SME Compliance and Evidence Pack Automation
work_packages.plain_description: A back-office automation route for accounting evidence, compliance support, filing preparation, and auditable SME workflows.

work_packages.title: Warehouse Location and Stock Evidence Automation
work_packages.plain_description: A warehouse automation route for stock/location proof, OCR review, batch ledgers, hold reasons, and operator-visible audit trails.

work_packages.title: Feasibility Study for Harmonic Remote Sensing and Signal-Processing Concepts
best_routes: AIRR if narrowed to AI-driven discovery
DASA/UK Space Agency only after partner scoping
work_packages.plain_description: Early-stage simulation and proof-of-principle research for remote sensing, signal processing, materials/energy concepts, and space/defence-adjacent sensing.
